rationale: Active war continues at maximum baseline; US attention remains partially diverted to Middle East (Beirut/Iran deal), which is a persistent concern for Ukrainian aid continuity.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: War on Ukrainian territory continues with no ceasefire or qualitative shift — daily threat to life, infrastructure, and displacement remains at maximum level.

top_events.title: US focus split: Trump condemns Beirut strikes, says Iran deal close
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy remains partially consumed by Middle East — risk that Western attention and aid momentum for Ukraine is diluted, though no concrete aid cut announced.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU formally advancing accession talks is a positive signal for Ukraine's long-term future and morale, though no immediate wartime impact.
